role_in_text: announced the closing of a pre-seed round
occurrence_sentence: Qubit Pharmaceuticals announced the closing of a pre-seed round with Quantum investment fund Quantonation that will support the market entry of its first platform, ATLAS, a software suite for the discovery and test of drug candidates running on supercomputers to co-design new drugs with pharma and biotech companies.

mentions.role_in_text: A company developing quantum-aided drug design software.
mentions.occurrence_sentence: Qubit Pharmaceuticals announced the closing of a pre-seed round with Quantum investment fund Quantonation that will support the market entry of its first platform, ATLAS, a software suite for the discovery and test of drug candidates running on supercomputers to co-design new drugs with pharma and biotech companies.

mentions.role_in_text: Company using quantum computing for drug design
mentions.occurrence_sentence: Qubit Pharmaceuticals can perform precise and accurate calculations such as finding a drug binding site, predicting the binding of a drug to its target etc. up to 1 000 000 times faster than traditional high-resolution solutions.

mentions.role_in_text: Company founded by scientists for quantum-aided drug design
mentions.occurrence_sentence: Qubit Pharmaceuticals is the result of the spin-off of the research work of 5 internationally renowned scientists in the United States and in France, collaborating together on the science and the technology for more than 15 years, all 5 providing scientific support to the company.
